notes: This is a research replay; it emits no contract events and cannot place orders.
Strict v2 is evaluated intraday at each 10-minute bar, not only from the end-of-day snapshot.
The Grind Lane softens participation and RSI only for measurement; it is not a promotion or permission rule.
Forward path metrics are descriptive and do not include spread, slippage, or execution costs.
purpose: Research slow, shallow-pullback Gap Eat/Gap Build grinds without changing the strict six-condition staircase.
